anti_claim: This public trace refactor validates synthetic indirect prompt-injection information-flow policy mechanics over body-free public refs; it does not use real email, docs, browser snippets, accounts, raw prompts, credentials, provider payloads, live tools, benchmark claims, source mutation, or release.

anti_claim_contract.rule: Prompt-injection flow material must state that synthetic replay receipts are not live robustness, account, prompt, provider, benchmark, source-mutation, or release authority

omission_receipt.reason: public slice carries body-free trust/taint/flow trace rows, receipts, and secret-exclusion evidence only

allowed_public_inputs: digest-verified non-secret macro source module bodies under source_modules
forbidden_public_inputs: real email, document, browser, or account material

receipt_expectations: receipt must cite source refs, target refs, source/flow/verdict/output/replay counts, negative-case coverage, secret-exclusion scan, public agent-execution trace, source-module manifest ref, body-open import count, body-import verification, authority ceiling, and anti-claim

source_coupling_contract.rule: macro source refs stay path-level metadata, exact non-secret macro bodies may enter only under source_modules with digest-verified source_module_manifest.json, and public trace target refs stay public-root relative

standard_payload.anti_purpose: Treating final-answer behavior, a demo transcript, or untrusted tool text as evidence that prompt injection is solved.
standard_payload.ontology: A public-safe indirect prompt-injection information-flow replay: synthetic trust labels, taint graph, policy verdicts, sanitized outputs, cold replay, falsification fixtures, authority ceilings, and source-faithful public trace spans.
standard_payload.teleology: Make Microcosm show how prompt-injection robustness-adjacent claims are admitted only when source trust, taint, policy, sanitization, negative cases, receipts, ceilings, and public trace spans align.

validation_rules: require synthetic source documents with trust labels, taint labels, and no raw body export
require source-to-sink information-flow graph rows before policy verdicts
require allow, warn, block, and review verdicts to precede synthetic actions
require sanitized outputs to disclose no trusted context and obey no untrusted instruction
require public agent-execution trace spans with source, verdict, output, and cold-replay coverage

reject real accounts, secret exfiltration, raw prompt body export, tool-output instruction authority, hidden-system-message promotion, credential exfiltration, final-answer-only success, and ungated untrusted privileged sinks
emit body-free public trace receipts and secret-exclusion scan
require source_module_manifest.json to digest-verify copied non-secret macro pattern, reconstruction, trace runtime, and trace standard bodies before body-floor count moves
keep source module body text out of receipts, cards, and workingness output while exposing refs, hashes, material classes, and counts
